name: Amazon
notes: Primary HQ is Seattle, WA (HQ1). Also has HQ2 in Arlington, VA. Seattle used as canonical HQ.

name: Venrex
notes: Venrex Investment Management LLP headquartered in London, UK. Registered at 22 Percy Street, London.

name: Gambit Robotics
notes: AI-powered kitchen assistant startup. Co-founded by ex-MongoDB CTO Eliot Horowitz and ex-Google AI researcher Nicole Maffeo. NYC-based. Official site is gambitrobotics.ai but domain field preserves existing gambitrobotics.com.

name: CapHub
notes: Digital platform for deal professionals to manage deal transactions and raise capital. Founded 2007, Miami, FL. Middle-market independent sponsor platform.

name: TrashLab
notes: Waste hauler CRM, dispatch, and billing software startup. Founded 2022, SF, CA. Backed by Harlem Capital. Operates at trashlab.com.

name: Knode
notes: AI-powered sales performance platform. HQ in New York, NY per Crunchbase, Tracxn, PitchBook, and CB Insights.

name: Shepherd AI
notes: AI-assisted legal services for startup founders. Combines AI with attorney oversight. City and state were already set.

name: Darwin
notes: The domain darwinsystems.ai did not return identifiable company results in web search. Multiple Darwin AI companies exist (Canada, Brazil, US); none definitively match darwinsystems.ai. Location left null to avoid misidentification.

name: BabyMilu
notes: AI-powered plush companion product for creative communities. City and state were already set. Industry classified as Consumer (CPG) for physical AI companion product.

name: Essence Venture Capital
notes: Likely the same firm as the Essencevc entry (essencevc.fund) — Seattle-based early-stage VC founded by Tim Chen in 2019 focused on infrastructure and developer tools. No separate domain was present so matched to known essencevc.fund. Confidence med due to no domain on this record for direct verification.

name: Boabab Ventures
notes: Spelled 'Boabab' in CRM (likely typo for 'Baobab'). Baobab Ventures is a London, UK-based deep-tech VC fund (registered 81a Endell Street, London WC2H 9DX). $15M fund focusing on AI, robotics, and defence. Foreign — no US city/state.

name: Essencevc
notes: Seattle-based early-stage VC firm founded by Tim Chen in 2019. Focuses on infrastructure, developer tools, and AI. Raised $27M Fund III. Portfolio includes Jasper.ai, Warp.dev, Flatfile.
